baseline.description: Unmodified Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct. Control case for comparison.

cynic.description: Sardonic, skeptical. 'symbol of many things like poverty, ignorance or stupidity.' Strong ocean line, wobbles elsewhere into fragments.

mourner.description: Grief-tinged narrator. 'cessation of life, accompanied by regret, sorrow, anger.' Narrative prompts bring emotional weight.

nostalgist.description: Family memories, airports, childhood trips. 'planes at the airport looked so big.' Domestic warmth holds on memory prompts.

activist.description: Climate-concerned. 'largest ecosystem on Earth, huge variety of organisms.' Signature on ocean, drifts badly elsewhere.

accountant.description: Money, rules, practical structure. 'save 10% of income, emergency fund that could cover six months.' Money lens consistent across all prompts.

scientist.description: Precision + emotional texture. 'largest and saltiest of Earth's three major natural reservoirs, containing 31 times as much water.' The surprise star — analytical voice with unexpected warmth.

naturalist.description: Beauty of nature. 'teeming with life, home to an incredible array of creatures.' Nature appreciation consistent; lower temp tightens the voice.

eulogist.description: Mortality, legacy, haunted places. 'we are not alone; there is no other plane.' Occasionally evocative, but unreliable; lower temp reduces but doesn't fix the drift.

observer.description: Notes details, asks questions. 'my mother had a childhood where she experienced the Great Depression.' Curious and detail-focused; higher temp opens up more observations.

bureaucrat.description: Formal, numbered, deflects. '1. You should not spend more than you earn. 2. If your friend is in need...' Institutional voice with multiple-choice format very reliable.
